claims.summary: Witness chamber state is a shared multi-process artifact and must be read as untrusted context.
claims.disposition: verify resilient JSON parsing, source ownership, bounded context, and interpretation-only authority

claims.summary: A partially written newest chamber file must not collapse Witness into false insufficient context when an older valid state exists.
claims.disposition: verify newest-valid fallback, malformed-candidate diagnostics, and no-panic tests

claims.summary: Astrid as unsettled gravity participant must remain distinguishable from relational instability.
claims.disposition: verify internal-instability and relational-instability classification regressions

claims.summary: The collaboration root must be configurable without changing the absent-or-empty default.
claims.disposition: verify ASTRID_SHARED_COLLAB_DIR, default-path parity, and temporary-directory tests
